meaning: n.一种矮脚的猎犬,露出vi.呈现,露出
examples: The basset hound was standing in a busy street, and everyone was stopped.
There are two, walking a basset down Beadel Street.
Bob Basset from Ukraine has created a cool looking dragon bag out of leather.
This year, the dog days of summer proved to be more greyhound than basset hound.
Then there is Deborah Basset, environmental activist and supporter of Sea Shepherd, an international NGO that hunts down whaling vessels with its very own navy.
